dialog.title: Need help?
dialog.description: We're more than happy to help! Please let us know what you need help with and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

home.title: Introduction to Footprint 👋
home.subtitle: Footprint offers frictionless identity verification & PII vaulting wrapped in the same platform and one API. Onboard your customers without worrying about storing their sensitive data afterwards.

quickstart.title: Quickstart
quickstart.subtitle: Learn how to get Footprint up and running in your project. Quick and easy.

kyc.title: Know Your Customer (KYC)
kyc.description: Verify your customers' identities with Footprint KYC.

kyb.title: Know Your Business (KYB)
kyb.description: Verify your customers' businesses with Footprint KYB.

vaulting.title: Vaulting
vaulting.description: Store your customers' sensitive data in Footprint's secure vault.

vault-proxy.title: Vault Proxy
vault-proxy.description: Use Footprint's Vault Proxy to securely access your customers' data.

embedded-components.title: Other Components
embedded-components.description: Use Footprint's PCI-compliant components to collect and render sensitive data.

auth.title: Auth
auth.description: Authenticate your users with Footprint's authentication API.

banner.title: Need help?
banner.subtitle: If you're looking to onboard customers quickly and securely store their sensitive data, we'd love to help. Schedule a call, reach out by email, or stay up to date with the latest updates by following us on Twitter.
banner.pii-alt: Our mascot, pii, resting on an ice-cube

contact-us-dialog.title: Contact us
contact-us-dialog.description: Let us know where to get back to you and we'll find some options to chat.

submit-success.title: Message sent
submit-success.description: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
